ogTitle: Alford vs Allenby Gardens: Climate Safety

heading: Alford vs Allenby Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alford, South Australia and Allenby Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alford and Allenby Gardens have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Alford or Allenby Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alford has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Allenby Gardens scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alford scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Allenby Gardens scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alford or Allenby Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
